ddls:
CREATE TABLE "local_agencies" (
  "lea_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local agency */,
  "lea_name" TEXT /* Name of the local agency */,
  "lea_type" TEXT /* Type of the local agency (e.g., district, charter) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the local agency's contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the local agency's contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the local agency */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the local agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lea_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the state */,
  "fipst" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards code for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charter_schools" (
  "charter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charter school */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "charter_authority" TEXT /* Name of the chartering authority */,
  "charter_status" TEXT /* Status of the charter (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "charter_text" TEXT /* Text description regarding the charter */,
  "charter_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the charter */,
  "charter_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the charter */,
  "charter_renewal_status" TEXT /* Charter renewal status */,
  "charter_network" TEXT /* Charter school network affiliation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades_offered" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the grade level offered */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Level of grade (e.g., KG, 1, 2, etc.) */,
  "offered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the grade is offered (1 = yes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., Regular, Charter, Magnet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the school type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Category of the school type (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "sy_status" INTEGER /* School year status flag (1 = active) */,
  "status_text" TEXT /* Text description of the school year status */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last status change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system (e.g., admin, educator, district official) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
